scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:requirements && npm run test:view-access-guard && npm run test:view-state-persistence && npm run test:decision-pack-rendering && npm run test:assess-to-studio-handoff && npm run test:docs-to-delivery-lineage && npm run test:delivery-policy && npm run test:govern-lite && npm run test:delivery-pack && npm run test:ai-boundary && npm run test:provider-resolver && npm run test:provider-resolver-integration
scripts.test:view-access-guard: node scripts/runTypeScriptTest.mjs types.ts constants/moduleConfig.ts services/viewAccessGuard.ts services/viewAccessGuard.test.ts
scripts.test:view-state-persistence: node scripts/runTypeScriptTest.mjs types.ts constants/moduleConfig.ts services/viewAccessGuard.ts services/viewStatePersistence.ts services/viewStatePersistence.test.ts
scripts.test:delivery-pack: node scripts/runTypeScriptTest.mjs services/avalaGovernLiteService.ts services/deliveryPackService.ts services/deliveryPackExportService.ts services/deliveryPackService.test.ts
scripts.test:provider-resolver: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('.agent/provider-resolver-tests',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('.agent/provider-resolver-tests',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('.agent/provider-resolver-tests/package.json',JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}));" && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node10 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir .agent/provider-resolver-tests supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverAudit.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolver.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerSecretAdapter.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolver.test.ts && node .agent/provider-resolver-tests/providerResolver.test.js
scripts.test:provider-resolver-integration: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('.agent/provider-resolver-integration-tests',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('.agent/provider-resolver-integration-tests',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('.agent/provider-resolver-integration-tests/package.json',JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}));" && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node10 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir .agent/provider-resolver-integration-tests supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverAudit.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolver.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverAuditDb.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverDb.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerSecretAdapter.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverIntegration.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverIntegration.test.ts && node .agent/provider-resolver-integration-tests/providerResolverIntegration.test.js
scripts.test:m3.2p-smoke: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dir='.agent/m3.2p-resolver-edge-smoke';fs.rmSync(dir,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(dir + '/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'}));" && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node10 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --rewriteRelativeImportExtensions --outDir .agent/m3.2p-resolver-edge-smoke supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverAudit.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolver.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverAuditDb.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverDb.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerSecretAdapter.ts supabase/functions/_shared/providerResolverIntegration.ts && node scripts/m3.2p-resolver-edge-smoke-mocked.mjs
